steps.title: Read the computer services data
steps.content: The statement asks about computer services in 2010 and then compares that category with other categories in 2019. From the graph, computer services is about 6,000 jobs in 2010 and about 5,000 jobs in 2019. Both years must match the completed sentence.

steps.title: Compare each year to the graph
steps.content: In 2010, engineering services is also about 6,000 jobs, while technical consulting services is about 4,000 jobs. In 2019, technical consulting services is about 5,000 jobs, while engineering services is about 6,000 jobs. So computer services matches engineering services in 2010 and technical consulting services in 2019.

steps.title: Eliminate wrong comparisons
steps.content:
• Choice A: The 2019 comparison is wrong because computer services is about 5,000, not about the same as engineering services at about 6,000.
  • Choice B: The 2010 and 2019 comparisons both match the graph.
  • Choice C: Computer services is not lower than engineering services in 2010 and is not higher than engineering services in 2019.
  • Choice D: Computer services is not about the same as technical consulting services in 2010, and in 2019 the two are about equal, not lower.
The answer is B.
